title: Options Reload
description: A simple mod that adds F3 + O to reload the game options from options.txt
body: A simple mod that adds F3 + O to reload the game options from options.txt This mod was made for those who want to play with the file but don't want to restart the game for every change Make sure to not be on the options screen as it might override the reload Fabric API is required for the mod translations to work ![](https://i.ibb.co/yphNcXz/fabric-only-banner.png)
